key_themes: Cocoa deflation and lagged margin recovery potential
Moderate Buy analyst consensus with ~$67 average price target
Brand strength, innovation in sustainable/lab-grown cocoa
summary: Investor sentiment toward MDLZ is positive, centered on expected future margin expansion as cocoa prices have fallen sharply from peaks, alongside its durable portfolio of iconic brands like Oreo and Cadbury. While Q1 2026 EPS is projected to decline ~15% YoY and full-year organic growth guidance remains cautious (flat to +2%), the stock's valuation (around 19-20x forward P/E at ~$57) and dividend yield make it a compelling opportunity for value and income investors.[[1]](https://www.marketbeat.com/stocks/NASDAQ/MDLZ/forecast/)[[2]](https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/MDLZ) Analysts hold a Moderate Buy consensus with average price targets near $66-67 (15-17% upside), and recent coverage highlights tailwinds entering FY2026.[[3]](https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/mondelez-international-earnings-preview-expect-151556823.html) Partnerships in lab-grown cocoa butter signal innovation amid supply concerns. Upcoming Q1 earnings on April 28 will be closely watched.
sources: 25+ web news/articles on earnings, guidance, and analyst views, 20+ recent X posts (earnings previews, cocoa prices, lab-grown cocoa partnership), 10+ Seeking Alpha analyses (predominantly bullish Buy ratings)
